#onetrust-banner-sdk {
  box-shadow: none;
  font-family: "Helvetica Neue", Arial, sans-serif;
}

#onetrust-banner-sdk:not(.ot-iab-2) #onetrust-button-group-parent {
  width: 40%;
}

#onetrust-banner-sdk #onetrust-policy {
  margin: 21px 0 21px 40px;
}

#onetrust-banner-sdk #onetrust-policy-text {
  max-width: 636px;
  font-size: 14px;
  line-height: 21px;
}

#onetrust-banner-sdk #onetrust-policy-text a {
  font-weight: 400;
  margin-left: 0px;
}

#onetrust-banner-sdk #onetrust-button-group { 
  display: flex; 
  justify-content: flex-end;
  padding: 0 40px;
}

#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-accept-btn-handler, 
#onetrust-banner-sdk #onetrust-reject-all-handler,
#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-pc-btn-handler {
  height: 36px;
  min-width: auto;
  padding: 0px 20px;
  margin-right: 8px;
  border-radius: 8px;
  white-space: nowrap;
  border: none;
  font-weight: 500;
  font-size: 16px;
  line-height: 24px;
}

#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-accept-btn-handler, 
#onetrust-banner-sdk #onetrust-reject-all-handler {
  background: linear-gradient(180deg, #DC244C, #BE003A);
  box-shadow: 0 2px 1px 0 #FF516B inset;
}

#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-accept-btn-handler:hover,
#onetrust-banner-sdk #onetrust-reject-all-handler:hover {
  background: #DC244C;
  box-shadow: 0 2px 1px 0 #FF8792 inset;
  opacity: 1;
}

#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-accept-btn-handler:active,
#onetrust-banner-sdk #onetrust-reject-all-handler:active {
  background: #DC244C;
  box-shadow:
      0 2px 1px 0 #FF516B inset,
      0 0 0 2px rgba(220, 36, 76, 0.4);
  opacity: 1;
}

#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-pc-btn-handler {
  box-sizing: border-box;
  box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px #717C99;
  color : #576280;
}

#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-pc-btn-handler:hover {
  box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #b4bacc;
}

#onetrust-consent-sdk #onetrust-pc-btn-handler:active {
  box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px F0F3FAFF;
}

#onetrust-banner-sdk #onetrust-close-btn-container {
  display: none;
}

@media only screen and (min-width: 426px) and (max-width: 896px) {
   #onetrust-banner-sdk:not(.ot-iab-2) 
  #onetrust-button-group-parent {
    width: 100%;
  }

  #onetrust-banner-sdk .has-reject-all-button #onetrust-button-group {
    width: auto;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
  }
}

@media only screen and (max-width: 425px) {
  #onetrust-banner-sdk #onetrust-policy {
     margin: 16px 0;
  }

  #onetrust-banner-sdk:not(.ot-iab-2) 
  #onetrust-button-group-parent {
    width: 100%;
  }

  #onetrust-banner-sdk #onetrust-button-group {
    flex-direction: column;
  }
